problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis may resolve What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
